code_landing_inventory.classification_basis: relative filename lexical match only; file contents not used

protocol_breaches: Discovery search exposed snippets from synthetic gen2 truth JSON before collector execution; no model score, threshold, or label statistic was computed, and no collected value depends on those snippets.

baseline_freeze.extraction: only the named family_audit JSON value was decoded

family_audit.family_definition: drawing_id OR SHA-256 of endpoint-order-invariant segment geometry normalized for translation, global scale, rotation, and reflection; coordinates quantized to 1/1000 max-bbox span

bstar_repair.extraction: only the named repaired_split_hash JSON value was decoded

in_flight_ledger.snapshot_semantics: recursive filename and byte-size snapshot; REPORT parsing limited to elapsed and status marker lines

unlabeled_corpus_census.discovery_method: exact metadata-only candidate paths on local C: and D: drives
